++ deactivate nondestructive 
 ++ '[' -n '' ']' 
 ++ '[' -n '' ']' 
 ++ '[' -n /usr/bin/bash -o -n '' ']' 
 ++ hash -r 
 ++ '[' -n '' ']' 
 ++ unset VIRTUAL_ENV 
 ++ unset VIRTUAL_ENV_PROMPT 
 ++ '[' '!' nondestructive = nondestructive ']' 
 ++ VIRTUAL_ENV=/github/workspace/nuttx-ntfc/venv 
 ++ export VIRTUAL_ENV 
 ++ _OLD_VIRTUAL_PATH=/tools/ccache/bin:/tools/gn:/tools/picotool:/tools/wamr:/tools/xtensa-esp-elf-gcc/bin:/tools/sparc-gaisler-elf-gcc/bin:/tools/riscv-none-elf-gcc/bin:/tools/renesas
